title: GROUP ANALYST – BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE (ACADO LIMITED)
description: GROUP ANALYST – BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE (ACADO LIMITED) Agostini Limited San Juan/Barataria Not disclosed Not disclosed Updated 12/02/2026 HR Apply Now Share Share this job Facebook Twitter Report This Job Save Save The Group Analyst – Business Intelligence collaborates with stakeholders and departments across Acado and Agostini Group companies in all regions to address business challenges by harnessing business intelligence platforms and integrated data solutions. Position Summary: The Group Analyst – Business Intelligence collaborates with stakeholders and departments across Acado and Agostini Group companies in all regions to address business challenges by harnessing business intelligence platforms and integrated data solutions. Job Responsibilities: Requirements Gathering: Collaborate with stakeholders to elicit, validate, and prioritize data and reporting needs, ensuring business intelligence solutions are aligned with organizational objectives. Process Mapping & Redesign: Document current data collection and reporting processes (“as-is”), and design future-state workflows (“to-be”) that optimize the use of BI tools and platforms. Gap Analysis: Assess gaps between business intelligence requirements and existing data infrastructure or reporting capabilities. Recommend enhancements, integrations or process improvements to bridge these gaps. BI Solution Ownership: Serve as the subject-matter expert for BI platforms and reporting modules, such as Power BI, ensuring optimal utilization and continuous improvement across departments. Report & Dashboard Design: Design, develop, and maintain interactive dashboards and reports that transform complex data into actionable insights for decision-makers. Integration Coordination: Define functional requirements for integrating BI solutions with other business applications (e.g., ERP, CRM, WMS, POS), ensuring seamless data flow and consolidated reporting. Configuration Support: Partner with business teams to configure BI tools, set up data fields, workflows, and access roles, maintaining security and data integrity. Data Quality & Migration Readiness: Establish data models, cleansing rules, validation criteria, and migration plans to ensure accuracy, consistency, and reliability of BI outputs. Testing: Develop and execute test scenarios, scripts, and acceptance criteria for BI solutions; coordinate system integration testing (SIT), user acceptance testing (UAT), and manage defect resolution. Position Requirements: A Bachelor’s degree in Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Management Information Systems or any relevant combination of education and experience. A background in Finance or Accounting would be an asset. Advanced certification in Power BI. At least three (3) years’ experience in a Business Intelligence Officer or a Business Analyst role. In depth knowledge of BI tools such as Tableau, Power BI, SQL and SSAS. Other Skills/Attributes required: Ability to undertake research into the industry sector, markets and competitors. Ability to collect, analyze and interpret data and statistics. Developing, advising on and implementing agreed solutions. Exercises sound independent judgement within established guidelines. Communicates in a highly persuasive manner (orally and written). Proven track record of delivering in time-pressured environments. Excellent communication and relationship building skills. Self-starter with strong self-management skills. Ability to organize and manage multiple priorities. Ref: GrpAnaBusIntgcccccc Apply Now

title: Nationaal verkoopmanager (National Sales Manager)
description: Nationaal verkoopmanager (National Sales Manager) Eve Anderson Recruitment Ltd Marowijne / Paramaribo / Wanica See description Permanent full-time Updated 10/02/2026 Eve Anderson Recruitment Limited Apply Now Share Share this job Facebook Twitter Report This Job Save Save De National Sales Manager is verantwoordelijk voor het behalen van de verkoopdoelstellingen door het uitvoeren van dagelijkse en kortetermijnplannen en het realiseren van strategische bedrijfsdoelen. De functie vereist sterk leiderschap om het salesteam te begeleiden, ontwikkelen en coachen. Functieomschrijving De National Sales Manager is verantwoordelijk voor het behalen van de verkoopdoelstellingen door het uitvoeren van dagelijkse en kortetermijnplannen en het realiseren van strategische bedrijfsdoelen. De functie vereist sterk leiderschap om het salesteam te begeleiden, ontwikkelen en coachen. De Manager moet snel kunnen inspelen op problemen en zorgen voor een tijdige en effectieve oplossing. Daarnaast is de functiehouder verantwoordelijk voor het ontwikkelen en implementeren van een Salesplan dat voldoet aan merk-, volume-, merchandising- en promotiedoelstellingen binnen alle verkooppunten. Hierbij worden tijd en middelen efficiënt ingezet ter ondersteuning van de algemene verkoopdoelstellingen. Taken en Verantwoordelijkheden Dagelijks aansturen van de Sales- en Merchandisingteams en zorgen voor de uitvoering van actieplannen en strategieën. Vaststellen en monitoren van maandelijkse verkoopdoelstellingen op basis van overeengekomen initiatieven per klantaccount en sales representative. Realiseren van groei in kernmerken (core brands) conform vastgestelde targets. Toezien op naleving van bedrijfsstandaarden en overige bedrijfsrichtlijnen en -beleid. Opstellen en uitvoeren van jaarlijkse verkoopplannen per regio om doelstellingen te behalen, inclusief deals, commissiestructuren en andere incentive-regelingen. Tijdig en effectief oplossingen bieden die aansluiten bij de behoeften van klanten. Toezicht houden op merchandisers om te waarborgen dat winkels correct worden onderhouden en aantrekkelijk zijn ingericht, met efficiënt gebruik van koelinstallaties. Beheren van Accounts Receivable (AR) , inclusief monitoring van incasso’s, afhandeling van accountproblemen, retouren en achterstallige betalingen. Opstellen van verkoop- en andere rapportages die verkoopactiviteiten weerspiegelen. Samenwerken met de General Manager op het gebied van planning en forecasting en fungeren als een sterke samenwerkingspartner met collega’s om efficiënte routes-to-market en concurrerende klantmarketing te realiseren. Zorgen voor implementatie van trainings- en ontwikkelingsprogramma’s voor sales representatives en merchandisers ter versterking van productkennis en verkoopvaardigheden. Beheren en evalueren van teamprestaties en het bieden van coaching en begeleiding ter ontwikkeling van competenties. Op de hoogte blijven van nieuwe productintroducties, marktontwikkelingen en activiteiten van concurrenten. Opbouwen en onderhouden van sterke klantrelaties door ondersteuning, informatie en advies te bieden en het aandragen van nieuwe zakelijke kansen en verbeteringen in dienstverlening. Waarborgen van continue training van sales- en merchandisingteams om vaardigheden en prestaties te verbeteren. Voeren van maandelijkse één-op-één gesprekken, het uitvoeren van kwartaal-KPI-besprekingen en beoordelingsgesprekken. Monitoren van concurrentieactiviteiten en productprijzen en het wekelijks aanleveren van business-intelligence-rapportages om markt- en industrietrends te volgen. Functie-eisen Afgeronde bacheloropleiding in Marketing of een aanverwante richting. Minimaal 7 jaar ervaring als Sales Manager binnen een food- of beverage-distributieomgeving. Goede beheersing van Microsoft Office. Kennis, Vaardigheden en Competenties Grondige kennis van het productassortiment en verschillende SKU’s van het bedrijf. Basiskennis van planogram-naleving. Kennis van de food- en beverage-markt in Suriname. Aantoonbare leiderschaps- en people-managementvaardigheden. Uitstekende probleemoplossende, besluitvormings- en organisatorische vaardigheden. Sterke communicatieve, klantgerichte, interpersoonlijke en onderhandelingsvaardigheden. Vaardig in MS Office; ervaring met ERP- of operationele systemen is een pré. Hoge mate van integriteit, aanpassingsvermogen en resultaatgerichtheid. Ref: NSM-20250210-MR Apply Now

title: Eve Anderson Recruitment Ltd
description: Eve Anderson Recruitment Ltd EVE ANDERSON RECRUITMENT LTD Eve Anderson Recruitment Limited leads the recruitment and human resource advisory services in Trinidad and Tobago for several international and local companies Operating for over 40 years, Eve Anderson continues to deliver excellent recruitment solutions to the top international companies in Trinidad and Tobago across many sectors including Energy, Construction, Banking, Legal, Manufacturing and Retail Distribution. Our candidates and clients value Eve Anderson’s in-depth knowledge of the marketplace and customized approach to finding the best for their career and entire business at executive, managerial and administrative level. Support services in Payroll, Psychometric Assessments, Coaching and Corporate Hospitality Event Management can be combined to deliver a holistic service and meet the recruitment and human resource needs of businesses setting up in Trinidad and Tobago. CANDIDATES Caring with purpose is what differentiates EARL and sets us apart.  We are strong advocates of hands-on career management and personal growth. Our Corporate Social Responsibility initiatives include career fairs and guidance workshops, where we counsel youths on the importance of education and obtaining the right qualifications to pursue their career aspirations.  We also work closely with graduates (non-vocational, technical and professional), helping them to navigate a successful career path and finding their best-fit first job. We encourage all existing and new candidates to pursue continuous education and personal development to remain relevant, achieve advancement/promotions or to facilitate embarking upon new career paths. CLIENTS Clients can confidently rely on us to find the most suitable candidates for their short term, long term or special support needs, and matching candidates to the unique personality and culture of the organization.  Candidates trust us to guide their careers from finding their first job to achieving advancement through promotion or a career change.  Our reach extends beyond Trinidad and Tobago with candidates having been sourced from and placed within the region and internationally. EARL has recognized the importance of providing solutions to companies that require our services. We believe that we can provide permanent rewards to companies that engage our services. EARL’s legacy is one of integrity, professionalism and expertise, tempered by a conservative yet proactive approach to the recruitment process. title: Marketing Analyst
description: Marketing Analyst Prestige Holdings Limited Port-of-Spain Not disclosed Permanent full-time Updated 07/02/2026 Human Resources Apply Now Share Share this job Facebook Twitter Report This Job Save Save This person will be responsible for collecting, analyzing, & interpreting marketing data to provide actionable insights & recommendations. This role will involve evaluating the effectiveness of campaigns, understanding customer behaviours & supporting strategic marketing initiatives. Position: Marketing Analyst Reporting Relationship: This position reports directly to the Marketing Manager – Subway Summary: The Marketing Analyst will be responsible for collecting, analyzing, and interpretingmarketing data to provide actionable insights and recommendations. This role will play acrucial part in evaluating the effectiveness of marketing campaigns, understandingcustomer behaviours, identifying market trends, and supporting strategic marketinginitiatives to achieve business objectives. Duties and Responsibilities: Data Collection & Management: Gather and integrate data from various sources, including POS systems, online ordering platforms, loyalty programs, social media, website analytics, market research, and third-party data providers. Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and integrity across all reporting tools. Performance Analysis & Reporting: Monitor, analyze, and report on the performance of marketing campaigns (e.g., promotions, digital advertising, local store marketing) against key performance indicators (KPIs) such as sales, transactions, ticket average, customer acquisition, retention, and return on investment (ROI). Develop and maintain regular dashboards and reports for marketing leadership, highlighting key trends, opportunities, and challenges. Customer Insights: Analyze customer data to understand purchasing patterns, preferences, demographics, and lifetime value. Segment customer bases to develop customised marketing efforts and personalize experiences. Identify opportunities for Guest engagement and loyalty program enhancements. Market Research & Competitive Analysis: Conduct market research to identify emerging trends, competitor strategies, and consumer preferences within the QSR industry. Provide insights on market dynamics and their potential impact on business performance. Strategic Recommendations: Translate complex data findings into clear, concise, and actionable recommendations for marketing strategies, product development, pricing, and promotional activities. Collaborate with the marketing team to optimize campaign performance and achieve business goals. Forecasting & Budgeting Support: Assist in developing projections for ticket average, transactions and by extension sales for marketing campaigns and ecommerce platforms and marketing budget allocations based on data-driven insights. A/B Testing & Optimization: Support the design and analysis of A/B tests for various marketing initiatives (e.g., ad creatives, landing pages, promotional offers) to identify optimal strategies. Technology & Tools: Utilize analytics tools such as Google Analytics, social media analytics platforms, CRM systems, and business intelligence software (e.g., Tableau). Proficiency in Excel for data manipulation and analysis is essential. Qualifications : Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Analytics, Statistics, Economics, or a related quantitative field. 2-4 years of experience as a Marketing Analyst, Data Analyst, or similar role, preferably within the retail, food service, or QSR industry. Strong analytical skills with the ability to collect, organize, analyze, and disseminate significant amounts of information with attention to detail and accuracy. Proficiency in Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, VLOOKUPs, advanced formulas) is required. Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Google Data Studio) is highly preferred. Familiarity with web analytics platforms (e.g., Google Analytics) and social media analytics tools. Experience with CRM systems and POS data is a plus. Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to present complex data in an understandable way to non-technical stakeholders. Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment. Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive approach to identifying opportunities. Ref: Marketing Analyst Apply Now
